actions_taken: Sent five direct messages to AI founders.
Recorded replies and silence before opening another research path.
outcome: One founder booked a call, one founder said the pain is not urgent yet, and three founders did not reply.
lesson: Procurement-delay language creates a stronger response than generic compliance language, but urgency depends on active enterprise deals.
responses: Founder A booked a call to discuss a paid readiness review.
Founder B said security questionnaires are not urgent until procurement starts.
Three founders did not reply during the timebox.
next_action: Run the same offer against founders with known active enterprise pilots.
